_note: BANNON UNIVERSE AUTO-GENERATED PROPRIETARY DIALOGUE FROM LEGACY BASELINE

mapped_interactions.legacy_baseline: I'm going to attack you when you least expect it.
mapped_interactions.bannon_adaptation: They think it's a game. A game! No no no... He knows. He sees you. He sees you trying to hide! The cuts, the cuts, the cuts! Stronger and stronger and stronger!

mapped_interactions.legacy_baseline: I want a title shot tonight or I'm quitting!
mapped_interactions.bannon_adaptation: The gold... the bag... it's mine! It's always been mine! Give it to me! If you don't... he sees you. He knows. He knows what you did!

mapped_interactions.legacy_baseline: I told you I was better than you.
mapped_interactions.bannon_adaptation: It's fine. It's fine. See the blood? He likes it. He likes it! Bleed for him! Stronger and stronger and stronger!

mapped_interactions.legacy_baseline: I need more money for this match.
mapped_interactions.bannon_adaptation: The paper... it's empty! Empty! He needs more! Add to the pile! If you don't... the rain comes. And it cuts! It cuts deep!

mapped_interactions.legacy_baseline: I'm going to attack you when you least expect it.
mapped_interactions.bannon_adaptation: Target acquired. Structural integrity test initiated.

mapped_interactions.legacy_baseline: I want a title shot tonight or I'm quitting!
mapped_interactions.bannon_adaptation: System parameters dictate a championship transition. Authorize the match, or face total system wipe.

mapped_interactions.legacy_baseline: I need more money for this match.
mapped_interactions.bannon_adaptation: The metrics don't align with your offer. Readjust the decimal, or the faction calculates your liquidation.

mapped_interactions.legacy_baseline: I told you I was better than you.
mapped_interactions.bannon_adaptation: Look at you! Scrub that blood off the mat before I run you over again! Welcome to the wasteland, bitch!

mapped_interactions.legacy_baseline: I want a title shot tonight or I'm quitting!
mapped_interactions.bannon_adaptation: Badaboom! You got the realest guy in the room staring at a fake champion! Put the belt on the line tonight or I walk, and take the ratings with me! How you doin'?!
